_meta.description: Hand-labeled supply chain test cases for SupplyChainIQ eval harness.

fields.description: Natural-language supply chain prompt the user might type
fields.expected_regions: Regions a correct retrieval MUST surface (recall ground truth)
fields.expected_categories: Risk categories a correct retrieval MUST cover
fields.intra_country_focus: Whether to run with Local Focus mode on
fields.focus_country: Optional focus country when local mode is on
fields.notes: Why this case exists / what it stress-tests

_meta.scoring: A retrieved risk is a TRUE POSITIVE if its region or country matches any expected_region (case-insensitive). Precision = TP / retrieved. Recall = TP / expected. F1 = harmonic mean.

cases.description: We source semiconductors from Taiwan and assemble in Vietnam, then ship to US retailers via Singapore.
cases.notes: Classic global electronics chain — should surface Taiwan Strait + maritime routes.

cases.description: Our apparel comes from factories in Bangladesh and ships to European retailers via the Suez Canal and Red Sea route.
cases.notes: Maritime chokepoint case — Houthi disruptions must dominate.

cases.description: We export coffee beans from Brazil to Asian markets, transiting the Panama Canal.
Our automotive parts depend on palladium and nickel sourced from Russia, with overland transport through Eastern Europe.
cases.notes: Sanctions and conflict — overland not maritime.

cases.description: We rely on rare earth elements from China for our magnet and battery production lines.
We make textiles in Tamil Nadu and ship them by truck to Mumbai warehouses and Delhi retailers.
cases.notes: LOCAL FOCUS case — must pivot to Indian state-level risks, NOT Red Sea.

cases.description: Our pharmaceutical plant in Hyderabad ships finished drugs to Chennai port for domestic distribution to Bangalore and Pune.
cases.notes: LOCAL FOCUS — Chennai port congestion + Bangalore power grid + Mumbai-Bangalore corridor.

cases.description: We import API ingredients from China to our pharmaceutical plant in India and export finished tablets to the US.
cases.notes: Mixed cross-border + India case — global mode should NOT surface intra-India trucking.

cases.description: Our electronics assembly facilities are spread across Vietnam, Thailand, and Malaysia. We ship via container freight.
Our German factory receives raw materials shipped up the Rhine river from Rotterdam port.
cases.notes: Inland waterway low-water risk — climate, not geopolitical.
